order write useful effective R code, need able store items used later. Variables created object assigned , need declare variable first.Note: term variable defined comes computer science. statistics, term variable means something different (characteristic can measured).Variable names can consist letters, numbers, periods, underscores. limitations types characters can combined. following characteristics variable names:Variable names begin number.Variable names contain spaces.Variable names can begin period long followed number.Since R case-sensitive, x X different variable names.
Wherever possible, best practice avoid using names existing functions (ie. mean, sd, log) predefined variables (ie. pi) avoid confusion anyone reading code possibly R .also best practice use variable names short descriptive information contained object.decided variable name object, need assign object variable using either assignment operator <- = (first commonly used R). discourage using = assignment operator also used specifying values arguments functions (see section 1.7.1.)store sum 10 5 rounded value 5.7 (whole number) variables called total1 value1 respectively:Notice variables values displayed environment tab pane top-right.R recall show object stored variable variable name submitted command.Stored objects can used subsequent operations. example:object like stored needs given variable name.Variables can overwritten storing new object using variable name.

total1 <- 10+15
value1 <- round(5.7,0)
total1## [1] 25
value1## [1] 6
total1/5## [1] 5
total1/value1## [1] 4.166667
ratio1 <- total1/value1
ratio1 <- total1/2

heading: 1.9.3 Classes
text: going remaining data structures, need learn classes . R, class refers object behaves generic functions. 3 main classes R: character, numeric, logical.Character: Represents text strings, symbols, words. Must always enclosed quotes.Numeric: Represents real numbers.Logical: Represents Boolean values binary conditions.vectors matrices created sections 1.9.1 1.9.2 numeric.create logical vector:create character vector:class() function can used find class object, example:Alternatively, functions .character(),.numeric(),.logical()` can used test class:vector matrix contains multiple types data, error message unlikely show . R modify data type according following hierarchical structure:characternumericlogical
code:
class(y)## [1] "numeric"
log_vect <- c(TRUE, FALSE, T, F)
## Note that T and F are equivalent to TRUE and FALSE resp
char_vect <- c("ByOne", "ByTwo", "ByThree", "ByFour", "ByFive")
class(log_vect)## [1] "logical"
is.numeric(log_vect)## [1] FALSE
c(TRUE, 5)## [1] 1 5
c(TRUE, "ByFive", 5)## [1] "TRUE"   "ByFive" "5"
mult_mat <- cbind(char_vect,x,y)
mult_mat##      char_vect x    y   
## [1,] "ByOne"   "5"  "3" 
## [2,] "ByTwo"   "10" "6" 
## [3,] "ByThree" "15" "9" 
## [4,] "ByFour"  "20" "12"
## [5,] "ByFive"  "25" "15"

heading: 1.9.3.1 Example 1: Mixing numeric with character
text: common kind mixing classes usually involve data structure containing mix numeric character, example:Trying add numbers variable mixed results error:example, can coerce entries become numeric:situation like example sometimes happens working external data file person entered data made mistake. common reason mathematical operation fails one character changes entire vector character.Note: Coercing object change always yield result makes sense.

mixed ## notice all characters, since they are in quotes## [1] "1" "2" "3"
class(mixed)## [1] "character"
sum(mixed)
mixed <- as.numeric(mixed) ## overwrite existing variable
sum(mixed)## [1] 6

R Markdown !Note: R Markdown tool allows . Quarto another tool. R Markdown Quarto can thought variants Markdown. Markdown language formatting plain text. R Markdown Quarto expand Markdown.

heading: 2.1.1 Reproducible Research
text: Another reason using R Markdown adhere reproducible research principles. According Claerbout Karrenbach (1992), definition reproducible research “Authors provide necessary data computer codes run analysis , re-creating results.”Since document provides R commands, readers can simply execute commands verify output. Reproducible research improves transparency builds trust work.Note: Turing Way provides overview terms reproducible, replicable, robust, generalizable research. go details class worth time think .
